summary: Full regression testing after comprehensive data wipe and reseed. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI flows verified: Dashboard, Support Pods (all 5 athletes), School Pod, Events page, Event Prep, Event Summary. Seed data correctly populated: 5 athletes, 20 programs, 11 actions, 9 notes, 3 events, 6 event notes.
critical_code_review_comments: Seeder (seed_fresh.py) creates complete interconnected dataset with realistic recruiting scenarios
Mission Control shows 5 athletes, 4 needing attention as expected
Support Pod displays profile completeness, target schools with health classifications, actions, notes
School Pod shows detailed school data: signals, playbook (action plan), coach contact info, timeline
Events page shows 2 upcoming (College Exposure Camp, Spring Classic) and 1 past (Winter Showcase)
Event Prep shows athletes, target schools, prep checklist, blockers
Event Summary returns 6 notes with interest levels (hot/warm/cool), 7 follow-ups, 5 schools
seed_data_creation: Seeder created: 5 athletes (Emma Chen, Olivia Anderson, Marcus Johnson, Sarah Martinez, Lucas Rodriguez), 20 programs/schools across athletes, 11 pod actions, 9 school-scoped notes, 3 events, 6 event notes with interest levels
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fresh seed data regression verified. All athlete archetypes working: hot_prospect (Emma), blocked_docs (Olivia), gone_dark (Marcus), narrow_list (Sarah), healthy (Lucas). School Pod playbooks generate based on signals. Event routing routes notes to Support Pods correctly. Dashboard shows accurate counts (5 athletes, 4 need attention, 1 event this week).
